name: Mint Bubblegum
description: A soft, chewy candy featuring a blend of two distinct flavors. With a bit of practice, you can blow impressively massive bubbles! Just watch out — if you push it too far and the bubble pops, you'll end up with a face full of sticky goo!

suspicious.name: Suspicious Mint Bubblegum
suspicious.description: A soft, chewy candy. You brave the mint's powerful chill, puff up your cheeks, and with great effort finally blow a tiny bubble. Then, just before success is within reach, it leaks with a few sad little pffts, and the whole attempt is ruined...
suspicious.effect: Revives a character and restores 900 HP.

normal.name: Mint Bubblegum
normal.description: A soft, chewy candy featuring a blend of two distinct flavors. With a bit of practice, you can blow impressively massive bubbles! Just watch out — if you push it too far and the bubble pops, you'll end up with a face full of sticky goo!
normal.effect: Revives a character and restores 1,200 HP.

delicious.name: Delicious Mint Bubblegum
delicious.description: A soft, chewy candy. Its fresh flavor glides smoothly down your throat, bringing an instantly cool and refreshing sensation. Better still, with a gentle puff, you can blow a clear, glossy bubble. A perfect little treat for passing the time!
delicious.effect: Revives a character and restores 1,500 HP.

special.name: Boredom-Busting Bubblegum
special.description: Lohen's specialty. Seeing that you were bored, he handed you a few candies and grandly claimed they'd help pass the time. After only a few chews, he suddenly pulled out a mirror and flashed it in front of you, looking entirely too pleased with himself. Oh no — it was a setup all along! Your tongue was already dyed a bright blue-green... So by "help pass the time," he meant his own?
special.effect: Revives the selected character and restores 20% of Max HP, then restores an additional 1,500 HP.
